title: User should be able to report a post by selecting a reason from a dropdown menu
description: The system shall allow a logged-in user to report a post by selecting a reason from a dropdown menu and confirming the report.
rationale: This requirement enables users to flag inappropriate content for review, ensuring the integrity of the platform's content.
business_value: Improves the quality and safety of the platform's content by allowing timely review of flagged posts.

source.description: As a user, I need to report a post by selecting a reason from a dropdown menu so that inappropriate content can be flagged and reviewed.

acceptance_criteria: A dropdown menu with predefined report reasons is provided.
The user selects a reason and confirms the report.
The post is flagged for review.
preconditions: The user must be logged in to report a post.
postconditions: The selected report reason is recorded for the post.
The post status is updated to 'flagged for review'.
A confirmation message is displayed to the user indicating that their report has been submitted.
security_requirements: User authentication must be required to submit a report.

non_functional_requirements.performance: Response time for submitting a report should not exceed 500ms.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.9% of the time.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system should handle up to 1,000 reports per minute during peak hours.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and user-friendly.

edge_cases: User tries to report a post without being logged in.
Dropdown menu is empty or does not contain any options.
User selects an invalid reason from the dropdown menu.

interfaces.name: Post Report UI
interfaces.description: The user interface where users can select a reason to report a post and confirm the action.

interfaces.name: Content Moderation API
interfaces.description: The API that receives the report, flags the post for review, and updates the post status.

test_cases.description: User tries to report a post without being logged in.
test_cases.expected_result: System displays an error message prompting the user to log in and prevents the report from being submitted.

test_cases.description: Dropdown menu is empty or does not contain any options.
test_cases.expected_result: System displays an error message indicating that the dropdown menu is unavailable and prevents the report from being submitted.

test_cases.description: User selects an invalid reason from the dropdown menu.
test_cases.expected_result: System displays an error message indicating that the selected reason is invalid and prevents the report from being submitted.

test_cases.description: User successfully reports a post with a valid reason.
test_cases.expected_result: Post is flagged for review, system updates the post status to 'flagged for review', and displays a confirmation message to the user.
